summary: Comprehensive testing of SEO domain consistency fixes. All backend tests passed (12/12). All frontend features verified working correctly.

GET /api/seo/sitemap.xml - Returns 200

GET /api/seo/sitemap.xml - All static pages present
GET /api/seo/sitemap.xml - Dynamic film pages included
GET /api/seo/sitemap.xml - Dynamic armory item pages included
GET /api/site-settings/seo - Returns correct URL settings
Blog post page loads correctly
Blog post uses full container width (max-w-none class present)
Blog post tags styled as rounded chips (border-radius: 9999px)
Tags have electric-blue border and text styling
Film Modal opens and displays Request Studio Access button
Navigation from Film Modal to Request Access works
Request Access page scrolls correctly (body overflow: auto)

seed_data_creation: None required - used existing blog post and films
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO domain consistency fixes fully verified. robots.txt and sitemap.xml use https://www.shadowwolvesproductions.com.au. Blog URLs in sitemap are properly slugified.
